  • Uses of Writable in net.boricj.bft

    Method parameters in net.boricj.bft with type arguments of type Writable
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    TestUtils.compare(InputStream expected, Collection<Writable> writables)
    Compares serialized output from a collection of writables against expected binary data.
    static void
    TestUtils.compare(InputStream expected, Collection<Writable> writables, Map<Integer,byte[]> patches)
    Compares serialized output from a collection of writables against expected binary data, with support for applying patches to the actual output before comparison.
    static void
    Writable.write(Collection<Writable> writables, OutputStream outputStream)
    Writes a collection of writables to an output stream, filling gaps with zero bytes.
    static void
    Writable.write(Collection<Writable> writables, OutputStream outputStream, int padding)
    Writes a collection of writables to an output stream, filling gaps with a specified padding byte.

  • Uses of Writable in net.boricj.bft.coff

    Classes in net.boricj.bft.coff that implement Writable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CoffHeader
    COFF file header containing machine type, timestamp, and characteristics.
    class 
    CoffRelocationTable
    COFF relocation table containing relocation entries for a section.
    class 
    CoffSection
    Base class for COFF sections.
    class 
    CoffSectionTable
    COFF section table containing all sections in the file.
    class 
    CoffStringTable
    COFF string table for storing symbol names that don't fit in the symbol table entry.
    class 
    CoffSymbolTable
    COFF symbol table containing symbol entries.

    Classes in net.boricj.bft.coff.sections that implement Writable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CoffBytes
    A COFF section containing raw byte data.
    class 
    CoffUninitialized
    A COFF section that reserves virtual space without storing raw bytes.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ElfHeader
    ELF file header containing identification, machine type, entry point, and section table information.
    class 
    ElfSection
    Base class for ELF sections.
    class 
    ElfSectionTable
    ELF section table containing all sections in the file.

    Class
    Description

    ElfRegInfo_Mips

  • Uses of Writable in net.boricj.bft.elf.sections

    Classes in net.boricj.bft.elf.sections that implement Writable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ElfGroup
    ELF section group containing a set of related sections.
    class 
    ElfNoBits
    ELF section occupying no space in the file (SHT_NOBITS).
    class 
    ElfNullSection
    ELF null section (SHT_NULL).
    class 
    ElfProgBits
    ELF section containing raw byte data (SHT_PROGBITS).
    class 
    ElfRelaTable
    ELF relocation table section with explicit addends (RELA format).
    class 
    ElfRelTable
    ELF relocation table section without explicit addends (REL format).
    class 
    ElfStringTable
    ELF string table section for storing symbol names and section names.
    class 
    ElfSymbolTable
    ELF symbol table section containing symbol entries.
